mapper.select: select id, email, login_id, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where id = #{id}

select id, email, login_id, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where email = #{email} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select id, email, login_id, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = #{phoneNumber} and status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update tbl_member set last_login_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}
update tbl_member set password = #{password}, updated_datetime = now() where email = #{email}
